chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2407 of 2022 CP D 2406 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10886/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Ms. Lubna Pervez, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, both the petitions assail notices. It is stated that it may be just and proper for the said notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that petitioners be permitted to raise legal objections including those with respect to the preceding audit notices. It is further sought that pending adjudication of the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned Assistant Attorney General articulates no cavil in such regard and states that these petitions may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
